topic: The "Platform Engineering Failure Mode" Report & Conway's Law's Revenge
angle: Platform teams must design internal developer platforms to mirror existing team structures (embracing Conway's Law) rather than dictating top-down architectures, as data proves ignoring this causes adoption failure.
why_viral: It uses authoritative CNCF report data to debunk the common belief that platform design can override organizational reality, resonating with senior engineers battling adoption issues.
